title: Looking for a Monday.com expert to temporarily assist with solving errors in CRM and order management set up
excerpt: We are currently seeking a Monday specialist to optimise and correct our setup. We’re a pharmacy in Victoria (Australia), we require an consultant for an estimated duration of 2-3 weeks. Remote worker is preferred.

posts.cookedHtml: We are currently seeking a Monday specialist to optimise and correct our setup. We’re a pharmacy in Victoria (Australia), we require an consultant for an estimated duration of 2-3 weeks. Remote worker is preferred.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jenh

Welcome to the monday .com community!

With orders continually flowing in, it can be difficult to organize between your inventory and your orders. It’s important to track purchases to make sure that your pharma products are ordered appropriately and your inventory is always accordingly stocked! That’s why, monday .com is offering pre-built templates to help you stay on top of your inventory and orders! By using these templates, you can create custom workflows perfectly crafted for the way your pharmacy wants to work.

If you’re looking to build personalized CRM workflows and resolve errors, it is effective to hire monday.com consultants from a recognized firm. These experts can modify templates and set up order management workflows remotely as per your business needs.
